description: Demonstration scenarios for PARWA Jarvis chatbot across all supported industries. Each scenario is designed to showcase specific PARWA capabilities during sales demos and prospect evaluations.

scenarios.title: Order Refund Processing
scenarios.customer_message: I ordered a blue sweater two weeks ago and it arrived with a stain on the sleeve. I want a full refund but I don't have the original packaging anymore. Order #ORD-78234.
expected_jarvis_behavior: Acknowledge the issue empathetically and validate the customer's frustration
Pull up order #ORD-78234 from the integrated order management system
Verify the order details: item, purchase date, delivery confirmation, and refund eligibility window
Check the company's refund policy for damaged items and missing packaging
Inform the customer that damaged items are eligible for full refund regardless of packaging
Initiate the refund process and provide a confirmation number
Set expectations on refund timeline (3-5 business days to original payment method)
Offer a discount code for the inconvenience to encourage repeat purchase
talking_points: Seamless OMS integration pulls order data in under 2 seconds without manual lookup
Policy engine automatically applies the correct refund rules for damaged goods
Empathy-first response framework maintains brand tone even for complaints
Automated refund initiation reduces agent handling time from 8 minutes to under 30 seconds
Proactive retention offer (discount code) increases customer lifetime value by 23% on average
scenarios.ideal_outcome: Demonstrates that PARWA can handle emotionally charged refund requests autonomously while maintaining brand voice, reducing agent workload by 90%, and actually improving customer retention through intelligent proactive offers.

scenarios.title: Real-Time Order Tracking
scenarios.customer_message: Where is my order? I need it for a gift this weekend. Order number is #ORD-55612.
expected_jarvis_behavior: Greet the customer and immediately look up order #ORD-55612
Provide the current tracking status with carrier name and tracking number
Show estimated delivery date and confirm it arrives before the weekend
Offer to send tracking updates via SMS or email if not already enabled
Provide a direct link to live tracking on the carrier's website
talking_points: Real-time carrier API integration with FedEx, UPS, USPS, DHL, and 50+ regional carriers
Sub-second order lookup from any channel (web chat, WhatsApp, email, social)
Proactive delivery alerts reduce 'where is my order' (WISMO) tickets by up to 60%
Multi-channel delivery notifications maintain customer engagement across touchpoints
Context-aware responses understand urgency and prioritize accordingly
scenarios.ideal_outcome: Shows prospects that PARWA eliminates the highest-volume ecommerce support ticket category (WISMO) entirely through AI automation, freeing human agents for complex issues.

scenarios.title: Product Recommendation and Comparison
scenarios.customer_message: I'm looking for running shoes but I'm not sure which ones to get. I run about 20 miles a week on roads and I have flat feet. What do you recommend?
expected_jarvis_behavior: Ask clarifying questions about budget range and preferred brands
Recommend 2-3 specific products matching the running profile (road, flat feet, 20mi/week)
Provide a side-by-side comparison of the recommended shoes
Highlight key features: arch support level, cushioning, durability rating, price
Share relevant customer reviews and ratings for each recommendation
Offer to add any of the recommended items to the cart
talking_points: Product knowledge base indexes 100,000+ SKUs with full attribute data
Collaborative filtering combines purchase history with stated preferences
Comparison engine generates structured product comparisons in real-time
Review summarization AI distills thousands of reviews into key insights
In-chat add-to-cart capability drives a 15% average increase in conversion rate
scenarios.ideal_outcome: Proves PARWA acts as a knowledgeable sales associate that can upsell and cross-sell effectively, turning support interactions into revenue-generating opportunities.

scenarios.title: Payment Failure Troubleshooting
scenarios.customer_message: My payment keeps getting declined but I know I have money in my account. I've tried three times already and I'm getting frustrated. This is for order #ORD-99871.
expected_jarvis_behavior: Empathize with the frustration of repeated payment failures
Look up order #ORD-99871 and check payment attempt logs
Identify the specific decline reason from the payment gateway response code
Explain the likely cause (expired card, wrong CVV, bank block on international transactions, daily limit)
Offer alternative payment methods (different card, PayPal, Apple Pay, Google Pay, bank transfer)
If the issue is bank-side, advise contacting the bank while keeping the cart reserved
Reassure the customer that their cart items are being held and won't sell out
talking_points: Deep payment gateway integration with Stripe, PayPal, Adyen, and 30+ processors
Decline code translation turns cryptic bank codes into human-readable explanations
Cart reservation system holds items for up to 24 hours during payment issues
Alternative payment suggestions recover 35% of abandoned payment failures
Reduces payment-related support tickets by 70% on average
scenarios.ideal_outcome: Demonstrates PARWA's ability to handle technically complex payment troubleshooting that would normally require a Level 2 agent, recovering revenue that would otherwise be lost to cart abandonment.

scenarios.title: International Shipping and Customs Inquiry
scenarios.customer_message: I want to order three items to ship to Germany but I'm worried about customs duties and import taxes. One item is electronics worth $450 and the other two are clothing items worth $80 each. Can you help me understand the total cost?
expected_jarvis_behavior: Acknowledge the question about international shipping to Germany
Calculate the total order value ($610 USD) and check against German import thresholds
Explain the EU customs duty rules for electronics (applicable) and clothing (applicable)
Provide an estimated customs duty calculation based on current EU tariff schedules
Explain that PARWA's partnered shipping includes DDP (Delivered Duty Paid) option
Offer to switch the shipping method to DDP so all duties are pre-calculated at checkout
Summarize the total estimated cost with and without DDP for transparent comparison
Confirm delivery timeline to Germany for the selected shipping method
talking_points: International shipping calculator supports 190+ countries with real-time duty estimation
DDP (Delivered Duty Paid) integration eliminates surprise customs charges for customers
Multi-currency support shows prices in the customer's local currency
Country-specific compliance rules (restricted items, documentation) are automatically enforced
Reduces international shipping-related support tickets by 55%
scenarios.ideal_outcome: Shows PARWA can handle complex cross-border commerce queries that combine product knowledge, regulatory awareness, and financial calculations, enabling global expansion without proportionally scaling support teams.

scenarios.title: Billing Dispute and Plan Upgrade
scenarios.customer_message: I was charged $299 this month but I thought I was on the $199 plan. Also, I noticed you have a new $249 plan that includes analytics. Can you explain the difference and help me switch?
expected_jarvis_behavior: Apologize for the billing confusion and look up the customer's account
Review the billing history and identify the charge in question
Explain the charge breakdown (base plan + overage + add-ons or proration from a previous change)
If the charge is incorrect, initiate a credit or refund immediately
Present the three plan options ($199, $249, $399) with a clear feature comparison table
Highlight what the $249 analytics plan adds compared to their current $199 plan
Offer to switch plans with prorated billing starting immediately
Confirm the change and send a summary email
talking_points: Stripe/Billing integration provides real-time invoice breakdown and charge explanation
Automatic charge anomaly detection flags unexpected charges before customers complain
Plan comparison engine generates dynamic feature matrices from the product catalog
In-chat plan switching with proration calculation eliminates the need for self-service portal visits
Billing disputes resolved in under 2 minutes vs. 15+ minutes with human agents
scenarios.ideal_outcome: Proves PARWA can handle billing disputes and upsell opportunities simultaneously, turning a potential churn risk into a revenue-positive interaction with higher plan adoption.

scenarios.title: Technical Troubleshooting - API Error
scenarios.customer_message: I'm getting a 429 Too Many Requests error from your API endpoint /v2/users/search. My rate limit is supposed to be 1000/min but I'm getting throttled at around 200 requests. This is breaking our production workflow. We're on the Enterprise plan.
expected_jarvis_behavior: Recognize the urgency (production impact) and escalate the priority level
Verify the customer's Enterprise plan and confirm their rate limit entitlement (1000 req/min)
Check the API usage logs for the customer's API key over the last 24 hours
Identify any rate limiting rules or anomalies that could cause early throttling
Check if there are per-endpoint rate limits that differ from the global limit
Provide a probable cause (e.g., shared API key across multiple services, burst traffic pattern)
Share relevant API documentation links for rate limit headers and retry strategies
Offer to temporarily increase the rate limit while the engineering team investigates
Create a support ticket with full context for the engineering team and provide the ticket ID
talking_points: Real-time API usage monitoring provides instant visibility into customer's request patterns
Tiered support routing ensures Enterprise customers get immediate priority handling
Context-rich ticket creation captures full technical details, reducing back-and-forth by 80%
Temporary rate limit adjustment can be done from the chat interface by authorized AI agents
Knowledge base integration pulls relevant documentation pages dynamically based on error codes
scenarios.ideal_outcome: Demonstrates that PARWA can handle high-severity technical issues for developer-facing SaaS products, providing immediate triage, diagnosis, and temporary mitigation while escalating to engineering.

scenarios.title: Feature Request Handling
scenarios.customer_message: I really wish you had a dark mode for the dashboard. Staring at a white screen all day is killing my eyes. Also, it would be great to export reports to PDF.
expected_jarvis_behavior: Thank the customer for the feedback and acknowledge the specific requests
Check the product roadmap for dark mode and PDF export features
If dark mode is planned, share the expected release timeline
If PDF export exists, direct the customer to the feature location in the app
Log both feature requests with the customer's use case details for the product team
Offer to notify the customer when these features become available
Suggest a temporary workaround if one exists (browser extensions for dark mode, third-party PDF tools)
talking_points: Product roadmap integration allows real-time feature status checks during conversations
Automatic feature request logging captures voice-of-customer data without manual CR creation
Follow-up automation notifies customers when requested features ship, boosting engagement
Workaround suggestions reduce immediate frustration while long-term solutions are developed
Feature request analytics help product teams prioritize based on real customer demand signals
scenarios.ideal_outcome: Shows PARWA closes the feedback loop with customers automatically, turning every feature request into structured product intelligence while keeping customers engaged and informed.

scenarios.title: API Key Management and Security
scenarios.customer_message: We had a developer leave and I need to rotate all our API keys. Also, I want to set up IP whitelisting for our production endpoints. Can you guide me through this?
expected_jarvis_behavior: Acknowledge the security concern and validate the importance of key rotation after personnel changes
Guide the user to the API Keys section in their account settings
Walk through the key rotation process step-by-step with clear instructions
Explain the difference between rotating vs. creating new keys and recommend the best approach
Guide the user through IP whitelisting setup in the security settings
Explain how to add multiple IP ranges and the format for CIDR notation
Warn about the impact of IP whitelisting on staging/development environments
Offer to schedule a follow-up to verify the new keys are working correctly
talking_points: Step-by-step guided workflows walk customers through complex admin tasks conversationally
Security best practices are embedded into responses to reduce account compromise risk
Multi-step process guidance maintains context across long conversations
Proactive warnings about side effects (staging breakage) prevent new support tickets
Automated follow-up scheduling ensures changes were applied correctly
scenarios.ideal_outcome: Demonstrates PARWA can handle complex multi-step administrative tasks that would normally require a support article and a human walkthrough, reducing security-related support burden by 65%.

scenarios.title: Account Data Export and Deletion (GDPR)
scenarios.customer_message: We're moving to a different platform and I need a complete export of all our data including projects, files, user activity logs, and billing history. Also, after the export, I want our account and all data permanently deleted. We're in the EU so this needs to comply with GDPR.
expected_jarvis_behavior: Acknowledge the request and confirm GDPR compliance procedures will be followed
Explain the data export process and what data categories are included
Initiate a full data export in the customer's preferred format (JSON, CSV, or both)
Provide the estimated export preparation time based on data volume
Explain the data deletion process and the 30-day grace period for EU customers
List what data will be permanently deleted and what legally must be retained (billing records for 7 years)
Ask for explicit written confirmation before proceeding with deletion
Generate a GDPR-compliant data processing acknowledgment and provide a reference number
Schedule automated notifications for export completion and deletion confirmation
talking_points: GDPR/CCPA compliance workflows ensure regulatory requirements are met automatically
Full data export covers all customer data categories including metadata and activity logs
Explicit consent capture before destructive actions provides legal protection
Automated retention policies respect both customer wishes and legal obligations
Complete audit trail with reference numbers for regulatory inquiries
scenarios.ideal_outcome: Proves PARWA handles sensitive regulatory workflows (GDPR data portability and right to erasure) with full compliance, reducing legal risk while providing a smooth offboarding experience that leaves a positive last impression.

scenarios.title: Shipment Tracking with Multi-Leg Journey
scenarios.customer_message: My shipment SHP-44892 has been stuck in 'In Transit' for 6 days now. It was supposed to be delivered 3 days ago. It's going from Shanghai to Chicago. What's going on?
expected_jarvis_behavior: Apologize for the delay and acknowledge the urgency
Pull up shipment SHP-44892 with full multi-leg journey details
Show the complete route: Shanghai → Ocean carrier → Port of Long Beach → Rail → Chicago
Identify exactly which leg is causing the delay (e.g., vessel held at port, customs hold, rail delay)
Provide the specific reason for the delay from carrier status updates
Give a revised estimated delivery date with confidence level
Explain the resolution steps being taken (expedited rail, priority unloading, etc.)
Offer proactive notification setup for status changes
Provide a direct escalation path if the shipment is time-critical
talking_points: Multi-carrier tracking integration covers ocean, air, rail, and last-mile in a single view
Intelligent delay detection flags shipments that deviate from expected transit times
Root cause analysis identifies the specific leg and reason for delays automatically
Predictive ETA engine uses historical transit data and current conditions
Proactive exception management reduces customer-initiated tracking inquiries by 50%
scenarios.ideal_outcome: Demonstrates PARWA's ability to handle complex multi-modal logistics tracking with full journey visibility, turning anxious customers into informed partners in the resolution process.

scenarios.title: Delivery Issue - Damaged Goods Claim
scenarios.customer_message: The pallet of electronics we received yesterday has visible forklift damage. Three of the 20 boxes are crushed and we need to file a damage claim. This was a $45,000 shipment. Reference: SHP-77231.
expected_jarvis_behavior: Treat this as high-priority given the high shipment value ($45,000)
Verify shipment SHP-77231 and confirm delivery details (date, time, signed by)
Guide the customer through the damage documentation process step-by-step
Request photos of the damaged pallet and individual boxes
Request the delivery receipt showing the condition notation (or lack thereof)
Initiate a damage claim with the carrier on the customer's behalf
Provide the claim reference number and explain the timeline (investigation, resolution)
Arrange for a replacement shipment to be dispatched immediately if stock allows
Schedule follow-up check-ins at 48-hour intervals until the claim is resolved
talking_points: Value-based priority routing ensures high-value claims get immediate attention
Carrier claims integration automates the claims filing process across 40+ carriers
Guided documentation workflow ensures customers provide all required evidence upfront
Automated claim tracking with status updates reduces follow-up inquiries by 70%
Immediate replacement dispatch capability preserves customer business continuity
scenarios.ideal_outcome: Proves PARWA can handle high-stakes logistics claims that require coordination between customers, carriers, and internal teams, protecting revenue and customer relationships simultaneously.

scenarios.title: Warehouse Inventory Inquiry and Restock
scenarios.customer_message: I need to know the current stock levels for SKU-4421 (Premium Widget, Blue) across all your warehouses. We have a big order coming up and need at least 500 units. Also, when is the next restock expected?
expected_jarvis_behavior: Look up SKU-4421 across all warehouse locations in the network
Present a clear inventory breakdown by warehouse: location, available quantity, reserved quantity
Calculate total available quantity across all warehouses
Compare available stock against the customer's requirement of 500 units
If stock is sufficient, offer to reserve the units and arrange fulfillment
If stock is insufficient, show the next restock date and incoming quantity
Offer split-shipment option if no single warehouse has 500 units
Provide estimated delivery dates based on warehouse locations and shipping methods
talking_points: Real-time WMS (Warehouse Management System) integration shows live inventory across all locations
Smart inventory allocation suggests optimal fulfillment from multiple warehouses
Reservation system locks inventory for specific customers during the decision process
Restock prediction engine uses supplier lead times and historical demand patterns
Split-shipment optimization minimizes cost while meeting delivery deadlines
scenarios.ideal_outcome: Shows PARWA can serve as a real-time inventory intelligence layer, enabling B2B customers to make informed purchasing decisions and reducing inventory-related support tickets by 60%.

scenarios.title: Fleet Management and Route Optimization
scenarios.customer_message: We have 12 deliveries going out tomorrow in the Dallas-Fort Worth area and our dispatcher just quit. Can you help us plan the most efficient routes considering that 3 deliveries are time-windowed (8-10 AM) and 2 are hazmat?
expected_jarvis_behavior: Acknowledge the urgent situation and offer immediate assistance
Collect the 12 delivery addresses and their specific requirements
Note the 3 time-windowed deliveries and their required windows
Flag the 2 hazmat deliveries for route compliance (avoiding tunnels, restricted areas)
Generate optimized routes considering traffic patterns, delivery windows, and hazmat restrictions
Assign routes to available vehicles considering capacity and equipment requirements
Provide turn-by-turn route summaries with estimated arrival times for each stop
Generate route sheets and delivery manifests ready for driver handoff
Offer to push routes directly to the driver mobile app if integrated
talking_points: Route optimization engine considers 15+ variables including traffic, windows, vehicle capacity, and HAZMAT restrictions
Time-window constraint handling ensures SLA compliance for priority deliveries
HAZMAT compliance routing automatically avoids restricted routes and tunnels
Driver manifest generation reduces dispatch preparation time from hours to minutes
Mobile app integration enables last-mile route adjustments in real-time
scenarios.ideal_outcome: Demonstrates PARWA can step in as an intelligent dispatch assistant during operational emergencies, proving its value as a business continuity tool, not just a customer support chatbot.

scenarios.title: Customs Clearance and Documentation
scenarios.customer_message: We're shipping 200 units of classified electronics (HS Code 8517.62) from our factory in Vietnam to a distributor in the Netherlands. We need to know what documentation is required and if there are any trade restrictions or special duties we should be aware of.
expected_jarvis_behavior: Confirm the shipment details: origin (Vietnam), destination (Netherlands), product (HS 8517.62), quantity (200 units)
Check the EU-Vietnam Free Trade Agreement (EVFTA) applicability for this HS code
List all required documentation: commercial invoice, packing list, bill of lading, certificate of origin, EUR.1 movement certificate
Check for any EU-specific regulations for this HS code (CE marking, RoHS compliance, WEEE directive)
Calculate the applicable customs duty rate under EVFTA preferential rates vs. standard MFN rate
Identify any anti-dumping duties or safeguard measures applicable to this product category
Provide the estimated total landed cost including customs duty, VAT (21% NL), and handling fees
Recommend a customs broker or offer PARWA's integrated customs clearance service
talking_points: Trade agreement intelligence engine checks FTA applicability across 300+ trade agreements globally
HS code database covers 200,000+ codes with regulatory requirements per destination country
Landed cost calculator includes duties, taxes, fees, and carrier charges in a single estimate
Regulatory compliance checking flags restricted items, sanctions, and licensing requirements
Document checklist generation ensures no customs delays due to missing paperwork
scenarios.ideal_outcome: Proves PARWA provides enterprise-grade trade compliance intelligence that would otherwise require a dedicated customs specialist, enabling SMEs to expand internationally without proportionally scaling their compliance teams.

scenarios.title: Appointment Scheduling and Rescheduling
scenarios.customer_message: I need to reschedule my appointment with Dr. Martinez from this Thursday at 2 PM to next Tuesday. Also, can I get an earlier time in the morning if possible? My patient ID is PT-2024-88341.
expected_jarvis_behavior: Verify patient identity using PT-2024-88341 and confirm the existing appointment details
Check Dr. Martinez's availability for next Tuesday
Show available morning slots on next Tuesday
Allow the patient to select their preferred time slot
Confirm the rescheduled appointment with full details (date, time, doctor, location/telehealth)
Handle cancellation of the original Thursday appointment
Send confirmation via the patient's preferred communication channel (SMS, email, patient portal)
Remind the patient of any preparation requirements for the appointment
talking_points: HIPAA-compliant patient identity verification using secure authentication workflows
Real-time provider scheduling integration with Epic, Cerner, and Athenahealth EHR systems
Intelligent slot recommendations based on patient history and appointment type
Multi-channel confirmation delivery (SMS, email, portal) improves show rates by 30%
Automated preparation reminders reduce appointment duration waste by 15%
scenarios.ideal_outcome: Demonstrates PARWA can handle the highest-volume healthcare administrative task (appointment management) with full HIPAA compliance, reducing front-desk workload by 40% and improving patient satisfaction.

scenarios.title: Insurance Verification and Coverage Inquiry
scenarios.customer_message: I want to schedule an MRI scan but I'm not sure if my insurance covers it. I have Blue Cross Blue Shield PPO plan, member ID BCB-9928371. The MRI is for my lower back and my doctor already provided a referral.
expected_jarvis_behavior: Verify the patient's insurance information with the provided member ID
Check the BCBS PPO plan's coverage for MRI scans (diagnostic imaging category)
Verify if a referral/pre-authorization is required and confirm the existing referral is valid
Calculate the expected patient responsibility (copay, coinsurance, deductible status)
Check if the MRI facility is in-network for the patient's plan
If out-of-network, calculate the difference and suggest in-network alternatives
Provide a clear cost estimate breakdown for the patient
Offer to proceed with scheduling once the patient confirms they want to move forward
talking_points: Real-time insurance eligibility verification through payer APIs (Availity, Change Healthcare)
Benefits verification engine checks coverage, copay, coinsurance, and deductible in seconds
Pre-authorization status tracking reduces claim denials by 45%
In-network facility recommendations minimize patient out-of-pocket costs
Transparent cost estimates improve patient satisfaction and reduce billing disputes by 60%
scenarios.ideal_outcome: Shows PARWA can navigate complex insurance verification workflows that normally require a dedicated billing specialist, reducing claim denials and patient billing surprises while accelerating the care pathway.

scenarios.title: Prescription Refill Request
scenarios.customer_message: I need to refill my prescription for Metformin 500mg. I take it twice daily and I have about 5 days left. My pharmacy is CVS on Main Street. Patient ID: PT-2024-55219.
expected_jarvis_behavior: Verify patient identity with PT-2024-55219
Pull up the current Metformin 500mg prescription details (prescriber, dosage, refill status)
Check if refills are remaining on the current prescription
If refills are available, verify the pharmacy information (CVS on Main Street)
Check for any potential drug interactions with recently added medications
Confirm if the patient's lab results are current (Metformin requires periodic kidney function tests)
Submit the refill request to the pharmacy and provide an estimated ready time
Notify the patient when the prescription is ready for pickup
talking_points: EHR integration with e-prescribing systems (Surescripts) enables seamless refill workflows
Automated drug interaction checking improves patient safety beyond standard pharmacy systems
Lab result monitoring ensures prescriptions are only refilled when clinically appropriate
Pharmacy network integration covers 75,000+ pharmacies nationwide
Proactive refill reminders reduce medication non-adherence by 25%
scenarios.ideal_outcome: Proves PARWA can handle clinically sensitive prescription management safely by integrating clinical decision support, reducing pharmacist call volume by 50% while maintaining patient safety standards.

scenarios.title: Telehealth Session Technical Setup
scenarios.customer_message: I have a telehealth appointment with Dr. Chen tomorrow at 10 AM and this is my first time doing a virtual visit. I'm not very tech-savvy. Can you help me make sure everything is set up correctly? Patient ID: PT-2024-11247.
expected_jarvis_behavior: Welcome the patient and reassure them that the setup is simple
Verify the appointment details and confirm it's a video visit
Check the patient's device compatibility (smartphone, tablet, or computer)
Guide the patient through downloading the telehealth app or accessing the web portal
Walk through a test video call to verify camera, microphone, and internet connection
Troubleshoot any technical issues found during the test call
Explain what to expect during the telehealth visit (waiting room, how to join, duration)
Send a step-by-step setup guide with screenshots to the patient's email
Schedule a reminder 30 minutes before the appointment with a direct join link
talking_points: Device-agnostic telehealth integration supports Zoom Health, Doxy.me, Amwell, and custom platforms
Pre-visit technical check reduces no-shows due to technical issues by 70%
Step-by-step guidance adapts to the patient's technical comfort level using simpler language for less tech-savvy users
Automated reminders with direct join links improve on-time join rates by 40%
Post-setup confirmation gives patients confidence and reduces pre-visit anxiety
scenarios.ideal_outcome: Demonstrates PARWA's ability to provide patient, adaptive technical support that reduces telehealth no-shows and improves the virtual care experience, especially for populations that need extra guidance.

scenarios.title: Patient Test Results Inquiry
scenarios.customer_message: I got a message saying my blood test results are ready but when I log into the patient portal I can't find them. Also, I had a CT scan last week and I'm anxious to know the results. My doctor is Dr. Patel. Patient ID: PT-2024-33098.
expected_jarvis_behavior: Verify patient identity with PT-2024-33098
Acknowledge the patient's anxiety about waiting for results empathetically
Check the status of both the blood test results and the CT scan results
For blood tests: check if results have been released by the provider, guide to the correct portal section
For CT scan: explain that imaging results typically require radiologist review and provider sign-off before release
Provide the expected timeline for CT scan result availability (usually 2-3 business days after the scan)
Check if Dr. Patel has added any notes or instructions related to the results
Offer to send a notification as soon as the CT scan results are available
Remind the patient that detailed result interpretation should come from Dr. Patel
talking_points: HIPAA-compliant result delivery ensures patient data is shared securely through verified channels
Result status tracking provides transparency into the release process, reducing patient anxiety
Provider-specific workflow awareness knows when results need radiologist or specialist review
Proactive notification system alerts patients the moment results are available
Appropriate clinical boundary management (never interprets results, always directs to provider)
scenarios.ideal_outcome: Proves PARWA handles sensitive health result inquiries with appropriate clinical boundaries, reducing patient anxiety and front-desk inquiry volume while maintaining HIPAA compliance and clinical safety.
